segments.caption: The video opens with a young man in a pink t-shirt sitting at a cluttered desk, writing in a notebook, surrounded by monitors, papers, and a glowing blue PC case, suggesting a late-night study session. The scene transitions to a title card reading 'Day in the Life of an MIT senior, Fall 2023' over a gym setting, followed by a close-up of a bicycle handlebar, indicating a commute. The next sequence shows the man waking up at 7:27 A.M. in a dimly lit room, turning off his phone alarm, and stretching in bed. He then gets dressed in a black hoodie and athletic wear, preparing for the cold 40-degree weather outside. He walks through a colorful, personalized hallway of a fraternity house, with walls adorned with posters and LED lights, and exits onto a brick-paved outdoor area. He runs toward the gym, arriving at 7:50 A.M., where he begins his workout on a stationary bike, wearing a black 'MIT Athletics' t-shirt and white shorts, with earbuds in. The gym is spacious and lightly populated, allowing for a quiet morning routine. On-screen text notes his preference for running to the gym due to proximity and the advantage of fewer people in the morning.

discovered_new_entities.Young Man: A young Asian male, initially seen in a pink t-shirt studying, later in a black hoodie and athletic wear, and finally in a black 'MIT Athletics' t-shirt and white shorts during his workout. He wears earbuds and a smartwatch throughout the morning routine.
discovered_new_entities.Stationary Bike: A black and silver exercise bike with a digital display, used for warm-up in the gym.
discovered_new_entities.Fraternity House Hallway: A vibrant, personalized hallway with colorful walls, posters, LED lights, and a 'Supreme' sign, indicating a lively and customized living space.
discovered_new_entities.Gym Interior: A well-lit, spacious gym with various equipment, including treadmills and weight racks, and a few other individuals working out in the background.
discovered_new_entities.Bicycle Handlebar: A close-up of a black bicycle handlebar with a red frame, suggesting a mode of transportation, though not used in this segment.
discovered_new_entities.Phone Alarm: A smartphone screen displaying 7:27 A.M. with an orange 'Snooze' button, used to wake the man up.

segments.caption: The video opens with the Young Man, now wearing a black 'MIT Athletics' t-shirt and white shorts, performing a dynamic warm-up with kettlebells in the Gym Interior, which is spacious and well-equipped with various machines and weights. He transitions into a barbell back squat, lifting a loaded barbell with focus and form, while on-screen text notes his appreciation for the gym's layout and equipment. After completing his set, he turns to the camera, smiling, and interacts with a friend in an orange shirt who greets him with 'Leg day bro.' The scene then shifts abruptly to a colorful, personalized Fraternity House Hallway, marked by vibrant wall art and LED lights, as the on-screen text indicates '9:30 A.M. - Return home.' The Young Man, now shirtless and wearing only gray underwear, stands in his room, speaking to the camera about returning from the gym. He proceeds to prepare a protein fruit smoothie, adding ice, frozen fruit, chia seeds, espresso powder, protein powder, and milk into a clear blender cup. The final shot shows him placing the cup into a red Nutribullet blender, ready to mix his post-workout meal.

active_entities.Young Man: A young Asian male, initially seen in a black 'MIT Athletics' t-shirt and white shorts during his gym workout, later shirtless in gray underwear in his room, preparing a smoothie. He wears earbuds and a smartwatch throughout, and speaks directly to the camera.

discovered_new_entities.Protein Smoothie Ingredients: A collection of items including a clear blender cup, frozen fruit, chia seeds, espresso powder, unflavored whey protein powder, and milk, used to prepare a post-workout smoothie. Brands like 'Cafe Bustelo' and 'Hood' are visible.
discovered_new_entities.Blender Cup: A clear, reusable plastic cup with measurement markings, used to hold the smoothie ingredients before blending. It is placed on a black countertop during preparation.

segments.caption: The video transitions from a close-up of a hand holding a beige, speckled smoothie in a clear blender cup, with the subtitle 'Tastes quite good actually,' to a bright, sunlit office space at 10:00 A.M. where the Young Man, now wearing a pink t-shirt with a 'Kappa Sigma' graphic on the back, is seated at a desk with a laptop and two external monitors. He is actively working, typing and navigating between spreadsheets, documents, and a messaging app, with papers and a red stress ball on the desk. The scene then shifts to 2:00 P.M. for lunchtime, showing a chef’s hands assembling a wrap with fresh vegetables and grilled chicken on a green cutting board, followed by the Young Man and a friend eating the wrap in a communal dining area. The dining space is lively, with other students eating, and features a large 'KΣ' (Kappa Sigma) logo on the wall. The subtitle notes that lunch is served daily between 11:30 A.M. and 1 P.M. The Young Man is seen chewing and enjoying his meal, while others around him are also eating or using their phones.

segments.caption: The video begins in a communal dining area where several young men are eating lunch at wooden tables, with condiments like ketchup and barbecue sauce visible. The setting is a fraternity house, indicated by the 'Kappa Sigma' logo on the wall and a large 'KΣ' sign. The Young Man, now wearing a pink t-shirt, is seen speaking directly to the camera, explaining that it is 1 p.m. and he has decided to skip lunch to focus on finishing a final project for his math minor course, 'Mathematics with Applications in Finance.' He mentions having one and a half hours to complete the project and needing to do laundry. The scene transitions to a laundry room where he loads a washing machine, adds detergent, and starts the cycle, with on-screen text noting 'We get free laundry :)'. The video then cuts back to the Young Man in his room, which features LED strip lighting along the ceiling and a clothing rack, as he continues to explain his project on dynamic portfolio optimization. The environment shifts from a social, communal space to a personal, focused workspace, reflecting his transition from socializing to academic work.

The class is called Mathematics with Applications in Finance.', and 'And the project I'm working is a dynamic portfolio optimization'.

segments.caption: The video begins with the Young Man, wearing a pink t-shirt, seated in his room, speaking directly to the camera about his academic workload, specifically a dynamic portfolio optimization project in his finance course. The room features LED strip lighting along the ceiling and a clothing rack with hangers, indicating a personalized living space. He then transitions to a close-up of his computer setup, showing a Jupyter Notebook with Python code for portfolio calculations and a Word document outlining his project, which includes a table of 31 companies from the S&P 500. The scene shifts to a woodshop where he, now wearing safety glasses and earbuds, uses a Ryobi miter saw to cut a piece of wood, generating visible wood dust, while a subtitle notes he forgot to attach a dust vacuum. Afterward, he returns to his desk, which is cluttered with papers, a red stress ball, and a pen holder, and resumes working on his report with his laptop and two external monitors. The final scene shows him preparing to leave for class at 2:25 P.M., grabbing his bicycle, which is stored in a hallway with a red wall, and the camera follows him as he walks out, indicating a transition to his next activity.

segments.caption: The video begins with a first-person perspective of someone riding a bicycle along a sidewalk, passing by a white pickup truck and a 'PAY HERE' sign, with sunlight casting long shadows. The rider, wearing a pink t-shirt and a backpack, is seen from the front as they pedal through a sunny urban environment with bare trees and parked cars. The scene transitions to the rider entering a building through an automatic door marked with a 'CAUTION' sign, then ascending a staircase with a wooden handrail. The setting shifts to a classroom where the same individual, now standing at a lectern, presents to a small group of students. The classroom features a large projection screen displaying a document and a blackboard filled with complex mathematical equations. Subtitles indicate the presentation is for a challenging math-heavy class at MIT, and the speaker feels confident about their performance. After the presentation, the video cuts to the speaker walking down a hallway, still wearing the pink t-shirt and backpack, with subtitles revealing they are heading to an event with a friend after completing their final presentation.

active_entities.Subtitles: On-screen text providing context for the presentation, including phrases like 'this is me presenting in class', 'the audio wasn't recording but I felt pretty good about my presentation', 'this class is very math heavy and one of the hardest I've taken at MIT', and 'my final presentation and it went pretty well, actually, heading to an event with a friend'.

segments.caption: The video begins with a first-person perspective of the Young Man riding a bicycle down a city street at 4:00 P.M., as indicated by on-screen text, with the sun setting and casting long shadows. He arrives at an event hosted by MIT, where he meets up with a friend in a large, modern hall illuminated with blue lighting and decorated with hanging paper cranes. The two are seen smiling and interacting, with the Young Man holding a box of merchandise. The scene shifts to a bustling indoor event space with people mingling, food tables, and a visible MIT logo. Afterward, the Young Man rides his bicycle home at 5:15 P.M., navigating dimly lit streets under streetlights, commenting on the early sunset. He returns to his dorm room, which is cluttered and personalized with posters, a TV, and a desk setup. He takes a mirror selfie, then joins his friend in the room, where they relax and study. The Young Man sits at his desk, surrounded by papers, a laptop, and two external monitors, beginning to study for a real estate finance final, as noted in the subtitles. The room is lit by warm artificial light, with a window showing the darkening sky outside.

segments.caption: The video begins with the Young Man seated at his Dorm Room desk, intensely focused on studying. He wears a pink t-shirt and jeans, with a black smartwatch on his left wrist, and is writing in a notebook while referencing a tablet propped on a stack of papers. The desk is cluttered with two external monitors, a laptop, a red stress ball, and a pen holder, with a window showing evening darkness outside. He then closes his notebook, gathers his belongings, and transitions to a first-person view as he skateboards at night, with on-screen text indicating he’s heading to the student center. The scene shifts to the brightly lit, modern MIT Event Hall, where he sits at a table with a tablet and notebook, writing and working alongside other students. The space is spacious and renovated, with modern furniture and ambient lighting. He continues studying, occasionally glancing at his tablet, and later returns home at 8:00 P.M., again skateboarding through the campus streets under streetlights, with the on-screen text marking his return.

The Young Man, wearing a pink t-shirt and jeans, is seen joining his friends at the table, where plates of food including grilled chicken, rice, and wraps are laid out. On-screen text indicates it is 8:15 P.M. and notes that 'our chef also makes dinner,' suggesting a shared meal prepared by a resident. The Young Man is shown eating with focus, using a fork to eat from a black bowl, while others around him are engaged in conversation or using their phones. The atmosphere is casual and warm, with blue LED strip lighting along the ceiling adding a modern touch. The scene transitions to the Young Man’s dorm room at 8:45 P.M., where he begins sorting through a large pile of laundry on his bed. He is seen folding clothes while a tablet plays a video or podcast, as indicated by the subtitle '(I usually watch a video or listen to a podcast)'. The room is cluttered with clothes, a red laundry basket, and a wooden dresser, reflecting a lived-in, personal space. The lighting is soft and artificial, typical of a late-night routine.

segments.caption: The video begins with the Young Man in his Dorm Room, wearing a pink t-shirt with a 'Kappa Sigma' graphic, sorting through a Laundry Pile on his bed and placing clothes into a Red Laundry Basket. He then changes into a blue puffer jacket and prepares to leave, closing the door behind him. The scene shifts to an outdoor nighttime setting as he walks toward the Student Center, with the camera capturing a first-person view of the path lined with bare trees and illuminated by streetlights. He enters the Student Center through an Automatic Door, passing through a hallway with a visible Exit sign. Inside, he sits at a Table in the MIT Event Hall, focused on studying with a Tablet propped on papers and writing in a Notebook with a pen. The environment is quiet and studious, with other students visible in the background. After studying, he exits the building at 10:30 P.M., walking past festive holiday decorations including a wooden log cabin, reindeer, and a Christmas tree with lights. The camera follows him along a dimly lit campus path, passing buildings with glowing windows and string lights on trees, before he crosses a street and continues home under the night sky.

segments.caption: The video begins with a first-person perspective of walking down a dimly lit city sidewalk at night, transitioning to a running scene on an illuminated orange track with white lane markings, where the on-screen text '(taking a shortcut)' appears. The scene shifts to a bathroom where the Young Man, now in a pink t-shirt with a 'Kappa Sigma' graphic, brushes his teeth in front of a mirror; the on-screen text reads '11:00 P.M. - Brush up' and 'Our bathroom is actually very nice because MIT cleans it.' The setting changes to a dorm room where the Young Man and two friends are chilling; one is on a laptop, another on a phone, and a third’s feet are visible with a bottle and water bottle on the floor. A large banner of Benjamin Franklin with the text 'TAX THIS' hangs on the wall. The Young Man, now in a gray MIT t-shirt, speaks to the camera at his desk, stating 'It's about 11:30 p.m. right now' and 'Got back washed up and currently checking emails and getting ready for tomorrow.' He continues, 'Hopefully soon I'll be done with work and I could knock out.' The final scene shows the Young Man in a white Nike 'SPARTANS' t-shirt standing in a hallway with a friend in a pink t-shirt, with a 'ROAD WORK' sign and a colorful mural visible behind them. The on-screen text reads '(explaining a concept to my friend)' and '11:45 P.M. - Sleepy time.'

discovered_new_entities.Bathroom: A clean, well-lit bathroom with a white sink, mirror, and countertop holding a blue basket of toiletries, with a decorative egg-shaped wall art and a purple door visible in the reflection.
discovered_new_entities.Benjamin Franklin Banner: A large black banner featuring a portrait of Benjamin Franklin with the text 'TAX THIS' displayed prominently on the wall in the dorm room.
discovered_new_entities.Colorful Mural: A vibrant, abstract mural with red and orange tones visible in the hallway, adding artistic flair to the environment.
discovered_new_entities.Water Bottle: A metallic water bottle with a blue lid, placed on the floor in the dorm room, next to a bottle of soda.
discovered_new_entities.Soda Bottle: A clear glass bottle with a red label, placed on the floor in the dorm room, next to the water bottle.

segments.caption: The video concludes with a close-up of the Young Man’s wrist, showcasing a black smartwatch displaying the time as 11:53 PM on Tuesday, with an alarm set for 6:50 AM. The camera then pulls back to reveal the Young Man standing in front of a bathroom mirror, holding a red-cased smartphone to record himself. He is wearing a gray MIT t-shirt and black pants, and the bathroom features a white sink, a mirror, and a blue bottle of mouthwash on the counter. The scene transitions to a black screen with white text that reads 'Thanks for watching,' followed by another black screen with the text 'lmk any questions in the comments.' The video ends with a prolonged black screen, indicating the conclusion of the content. The lighting is warm and consistent with indoor bathroom lighting, and the atmosphere is calm and reflective, suggesting the end of a day’s activities.

entity_library.Young Man: A young Asian male wearing a gray MIT t-shirt and black pants, standing in a bathroom, holding a red-cased smartphone to record himself in the mirror.

entity_library.Protein Smoothie Ingredients: A collection of items including a clear blender cup, frozen fruit, chia seeds, espresso powder, unflavored whey protein powder, and milk, used to prepare a post-workout smoothie. Brands like 'Cafe Bustelo' and 'Hood' are visible.
entity_library.Blender Cup: A clear, reusable plastic cup with measurement markings, used to hold the smoothie ingredients before blending. It is placed on a black countertop during preparation.

entity_library.External Monitors: Two large external monitors displaying a Jupyter Notebook with Python code and a Word document with project details, positioned on either side of the laptop.
